partner.name: Thorne-Blackwood
partner.sub_narrative: A six-year evolution using a high-liquidity anchor to survive three global regime shifts via a 72-month locked-horizon anchor.
testimony: We didn't enter for short-term gains. We required an infrastructure that could handle an L1 anchor without slippage.
The drama on our chart reflects the Hard Breaker node stopping market noise at Month 24.
This is the platinum standard for institutional management.

performance_model.pnl_data: Generated dynamically over 72 points with upward bias and managed volatility

partner.compliance_disclaimer: Institutional Sovereign Model. 72-Month Track. Baseline: 1.5% Risk.
